description: Enrichment Data — Regulatory data, association benchmarks, business listing integration

tasks.title: Association Benchmark Data loader
tasks.prompt:
Extend the Enrichment Service with Association & Industry Benchmark Data loading (M7.3).

Add a benchmark data loader that:
1. Reads industry benchmark fixture data from JSON files (src/Snapp.Service.Enrichment/Fixtures/benchmarks/)
2. Creates fixture files with realistic dental benchmark data: practice revenue quartiles by specialty/geography/size, staff compensation ranges by role, overhead ratios, production metrics
3. Loads into snapp-intel as BENCH# and COHORT# items
4. These benchmarks calibrate the scoring engine thresholds (the scoring engine should now use these as the baseline instead of hardcoded values)

Also add a regulatory data loader (M7.2): create fixture with synthetic CMS-like data (prescribing volumes, graduation years, patient demographics) for the test provider set. Store as SIGNAL# items.

Integration tests: load benchmark fixtures, verify scoring engine uses them for calibration, verify benchmark API returns loaded data.
tasks.done_when: Benchmark fixtures loaded. Scoring engine calibrated from benchmark data. Tests pass.

tasks.title: Business Listing Integration
tasks.prompt:
Extend the Enrichment Service with Business Listing Integration (M7.4).

Add a business listing loader that:
1. For local dev: reads from fixture file with synthetic Google Places-like data (name, address, rating, review count, website URL) for 50-100 test practices
2. Multi-pass matching to provider registry records: phone exact (confidence 1.0) → address exact (0.8) → name+city fuzzy (0.5-0.7)
3. Stores matched listings as SIGNAL# items with confidence scores
4. Reputation signals (rating ≥ 4.5 AND reviews ≥ 100 = strong-online-reputation flag)

For future production: stub out a GooglePlacesClient that would hit the real API (behind IBusinessListingProvider interface).

Integration tests: load fixture, verify matching, verify confidence scores, verify reputation flag.
tasks.done_when: Business listing fixtures matched to providers. Confidence-scored reputation signals stored. Tests pass.

tasks.title: Sprint 9 integration validation
tasks.prompt: Validate Sprint 9. Run full enrichment pipeline (registry + benchmarks + listings), verify intelligence dashboard shows richer data (benchmarks calibrated, reputation signals visible). Run all tests. Write .claude/reports/sprint-9-validation.md.
tasks.done_when: Full enrichment pipeline works. Intelligence layer enriched. All tests pass. Validation report written.
